response.text:

rationale: r4c1 is critically depleted (10% SoC) with urgent need; lowering share floor to 0.25 enables 0.5 kWh micro-share to support cluster recovery and reciprocal support chain with r3c0.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r4c1. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'urgent'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.10 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=balanced, share_min_soc_frac=0.25, distrusted_peers=['r3c1'].
Your latest belief: Cascading depletion crisis; r3c1 support failed. r3c0 is sole reliable ally (2× ACCEPT). r4c1 critically depleted (SoC ~10%) with repeated urgent requests. Lowering share floor to 0.25 (45 min survival) to enable micro-shares (0.2–0.3 kWh per request) to r3c0 and r4c1. Cluster recovery requires immediate reciprocal support. If inbound does not arrive within 15 ticks, initiate load-shedding..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
